description: Prosodic mode honoring the Ainu yukar (epic oral poetry) tradition. Yukar are recited in rhythmic, pulsed patterns — each phrase carries a repetitive melodic contour that aids memory and transmission across generations. Delivery uses micro-emphasis at structural transitions reflecting the yukar's episodic pulse. Pauses mark narrative boundaries. This mode honors the Ainu principle that stories are not told but re-lived through voice.
intended_use: Preservation of Ainu yukar (epic poetry) prosodic patterns
Cultural voice interfaces honoring Indigenous Japanese oral tradition
Rhythmic narrative delivery systems for episodic oral literature
